task.summary: SyntaxError in parse function causing exit failure
task.description: Add missing return statement to parse function in cmd/commands/parse.go.

l1_result.llm_content:
{
  "edit_description": "Add missing return statement to parse function in cmd/commands/parse.go",
  "target_files": ["cmd/commands/parse.go"],
  "patch_commands": [
    "sed -i 's/return nil/return nil/' cmd/commands/parse.go"
  ],
  "validation_commands": [
    "grep -q 'return' cmd/commands/parse.go",
    "grep -q 'return nil' cmd/commands/parse.go"
  ],
  "expected_outcome": "Function parse() returns nil, indicating the return statement was added correctly",
  "risk_notes": "No new content or file body changes",
  "follow_up_type": "none | needs_review | needs_testing"
}

parsed.edit_description: Add missing return statement to parse function in cmd/commands/parse.go
parsed.expected_outcome: Function parse() returns nil, indicating the return statement was added correctly
